PostToolUse.hook:
bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; echo "=== POST-BUILD VALIDATION ==="; SIZE=$(wc -c < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "File size: ${SIZE} bytes"; if [ "$SIZE" -gt 51200 ]; then echo "WARNING: File exceeds 50KB target ($SIZE bytes)"; fi; H1=$(grep -c "/dev/null || echo 0); echo "H1 tags found: $H1"; if [ "$H1" -ne 1 ]; then echo "ERROR: Expected exactly 1

tag, found $H1"; fi; SECTIONS=$(grep -c "/dev/null || echo 0); echo "Sections found: $SECTIONS"; if [ "$SECTIONS" -lt 8 ]; then echo "WARNING: Expected 8+ sections, found $SECTIONS"; fi; CALENDLY=$(grep -c "calendly.com" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "Calendly links: $CALENDLY"; if [ "$CALENDLY" -lt 3 ]; then echo "WARNING: Expected 3+ CTA links to Calendly, found $CALENDLY"; fi; IMG=$(grep -c "/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$IMG" -gt 0 ]; then echo "ERROR: Found $IMG tags — all visuals must be CSS/SVG/HTML only"; fi; INTER=$(grep -ic "inter" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); ROBOTO=$(grep -ic "roboto" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); ARIAL=$(grep -ic "arial" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$INTER" -gt 0 ] || [ "$ROBOTO" -gt 0 ] || [ "$ARIAL" -gt 0 ]; then echo "ERROR: Banned font detected (Inter/Roboto/Arial)"; fi; ARIA=$(grep -c "aria-expanded" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "aria-expanded attributes: $ARIA"; if [ "$ARIA" -lt 4 ]; then echo "WARNING: FAQ accordion needs aria-expanded on each item (found $ARIA)"; fi; echo "=== VALIDATION COMPLETE ==="'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; SIZE=$(wc -c < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "Post-edit size: ${SIZE} bytes"; if [ "$SIZE" -gt 51200 ]; then echo "WARNING: File now exceeds 50KB target"; fi; H1=$(grep -c "<h1" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$H1" -ne 1 ]; then echo "ERROR: H1 count is $H1 (expected 1)"; fi'
